title: Brainbase takes its AI agent cloud GA

scenes.text: Deploying an AI agent is now one command
scenes.voiceSegment: Deploying an AI agent is now as easy as deploying a website.

scenes.text: Brainbase: the AI agent cloud, now GA
scenes.imagePrompt: isometric floating cloud platform with small glowing robot figures standing on it, streams of glowing code blocks flowing up into the cloud from a stylized terminal window below
scenes.voiceSegment: A Y C startup called Brainbase just took its AI agent cloud into general availability. Think of it like Vercel, but for agents.

scenes.leftText: Wire up hosting, scaling and evals yourself
scenes.rightText: A few lines of YAML, then push
scenes.voiceSegment: The old way: you wire up hosting, scaling, and evaluations yourself. The new way: describe your agent in a few lines of YAML, and push it to the cloud.

scenes.label: app triggers
scenes.voiceSegment: Agents kick off from webhooks, schedules, or over one thousand app triggers, like Slack, GitHub, and Linear.

scenes.text: SOC 2 · HIPAA · any model, any harness
scenes.imagePrompt: isometric secure data center fortress with a large glowing holographic shield hovering above server racks, orbiting padlock icons and clean network connection lines
scenes.voiceSegment: And it is enterprise ready out of the box. SOC 2, HIPAA, even hybrid deployment. Any model, any harness.
